title: Principal SEO Specialist at Voylla Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Principal SEO Specialist at Voylla Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Voylla Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Hyderabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Voylla Ventures Solutions:
Voylla Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voylla Ventures Solutions!
